description_long: This is a polished black granite grave monument consisting of a rectangular base and an upright headstone. The headstone features a prominent engraved Latin cross on the left side and several lines of white inscriptions, including names and dates, in Polish. The base is a flat, rectangular slab that extends forward, providing a platform in front of the headstone. The surface of the monument is smooth and reflective, with a speckled granite texture visible throughout. The overall design is simple yet dignified, with the cross and inscriptions serving as the main decorative elements. The monument is solid and heavy, typical of traditional cemetery gravestones.
description: A polished black granite grave monument with a rectangular base and upright headstone, featuring a Latin cross and white inscriptions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the engraved cross and detailed white inscriptions on the headstone, with the full length of the base visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the headstone and the flat, extended base slab.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back of the headstone and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the headstone's profile and the smooth, polished surface of the base.
